audience_policies.source_phrase: Each coupon provides a 50% discount on admission for up to 2 adults and 2 children who arrive in one vehicle. Children under two years of age are admitted free. coupon.source_phrase_block: Each coupon provides a 50% discount on admission for up to 2 adults and 2 children who arrive in one vehicle. Children under two years of age are admitted free. The EcoTarium is closed on some holidays. Please check the EcoTarium website for details. Museum pass coupons do not cover the cost for tickets to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express Train, or special ticketed events.
